10. Considering the facts and circumstances and in view 
of the findings recorded by the scrutiny committee, I am 
inclined to accept the submission that the Petitioners who 
are neither existing co-operative societies or members 
of the existing co-operative societies lack locus standi to 
challenge the impugned orders. 
11. As regards merits, the scrutiny committee who is in 
the form of expert body after scrutinising the documents 
filed in support of the application/s made by the contesting 
Respondents has recorded the specific finding that the.
